title: Complex formation between VPS13C and Rab7
author: Dazhi Li

steps.title: Co-express N-terminally Strep-tagged Rab7A and C-terminally...
steps.instruction: Co-express N-terminally Strep-tagged Rab7A and C-terminally 3xFLAG-tagged VPS13C full-length or mutant constructs in Expi293F cells. For transfection, mix 30 μg Rab7A plasmid and 70 μg VPS13C plasmid in Opti-MEM and Expifectamine and transfect into 100 mL Expi293F cells.

steps.title: Lyse cells by three freeze–thaw cycles and clarify the lysate
steps.instruction: Lyse cells by three freeze–thaw cycles and clarify the lysate.

steps.title: After 48 h, harvest cells and...
steps.instruction: After 48 h, harvest cells and resuspend in 10 mL buffer A (500 mM NaCl, 50 mM HEPES, pH 7.8, 10% glycerol, 1 mM TCEP) supplemented with 1 mM GTP Sodium GTP Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #G8877 and 2 mM MgCl 2 .

steps.title: Elute bound proteins three times in...
steps.instruction: Elute bound proteins three times in 50 μL buffer A supplemented with 0.5 mg/mL FLAG peptide for FLAG pull-down or 50 mM D-biotin for Strep pull-down, incubating for 00:20:00 for each elution.

steps.title: Wash the resin four times with 15 mL buffer A
steps.instruction: Wash the resin four times with 15 mL buffer A.

steps.title: Divide the clarified lysate, using 30%...
steps.instruction: Divide the clarified lysate, using 30% for FLAG pull-down with 50 μL anti-FLAG M2 resin and 70% for Strep pull-down with 50 μL Strep-Tactin XT 4Flow high-capacity resin. Incubate each pull-down for 02:00:00 at 4 °C .

steps.title: For the VPS13C-VAB domain alone, detect...
steps.instruction: For the VPS13C-VAB domain alone, detect co-purified protein by anti-FLAG western blot because it is not reliably quantified by Coomassie staining.

steps.title: Quantify VPS13C binding by normalizing the...
steps.instruction: Quantify VPS13C binding by normalizing the intensity of each co-purified VPS13C band to the corresponding Rab7A band, then normalize to the full-length VPS13C control.

steps.title: Analyze Strep pull-down eluates by SDS-PAGE
steps.instruction: Analyze Strep pull-down eluates by SDS-PAGE. For better separation, resolve Rab7A on 4–20% Tris-glycine gels and co-purified VPS13C on 3–8% Tris-acetate gels.

steps.title: Pool the eluates and concentrate to...
steps.instruction: Pool the eluates and concentrate to a final volume of 50 μL.

steps.title: Transfect and express MBP-TEV-Rab7A-6xHis in Expi293F cells
steps.instruction: Transfect and express MBP-TEV-Rab7A-6xHis in Expi293F cells. Lyse cells by three freeze–thaw cycles and clarify the lysate.

steps.title: Add 0
steps.instruction: Add 0.1% glutaraldehyde to VPS13C alone, Rab7A alone, or the VPS13C+Rab7A mixture, and incubate for 00:15:00 at Room temperature .

steps.title: Mix purified full-length VPS13C-3xFLAG and MBP-Rab7A-6xHis...
steps.instruction: Mix purified full-length VPS13C-3xFLAG and MBP-Rab7A-6xHis at a 1:10 molar ratio and incubate Overnight at 4 °C .

steps.title: Run pooled eluates on a Superose...
steps.instruction: Run pooled eluates on a Superose 6 size-exclusion column equilibrated in buffer B (200 mM NaCl, 50 mM HEPES, pH 7.2, 6% glycerol, 1 mM TCEP) to remove maltose.

steps.title: Incubate clarified lysate with Amylose resin...
steps.instruction: Incubate clarified lysate with Amylose resin for 02:00:00 at 4 °C , wash the resin, and elute bound protein with buffer A supplemented with 50 mM maltose.

steps.title: Subject all samples to MBP pull-down as described above
steps.instruction: Subject all samples to MBP pull-down as described above.

steps.title: Quench the cross-linking reaction with 100 mM Tris, pH 8
steps.instruction: Quench the cross-linking reaction with 100 mM Tris, pH 8.0, for 00:10:00 at Room temperature .

steps.title: Analyze cross-linked VPS13C–Rab7A complexes by SDS-PAGE
steps.instruction: Analyze cross-linked VPS13C–Rab7A complexes by SDS-PAGE.
